annotations.caption: Headline counts; absorbs facts cut from degenerate charts.
Shown only with >=3 substrate values (else folded into At a glance).
Funnel when stages differ; explicit empty-state when sequenced == 0.
Replaces a flat three-equal-bar pipeline with one completion stat.
Gap-aware; suppressed for single-month or single-month-dominated projects.
Default shows only with >=2 samplers AND near-full coverage; eval campaigns promote it via override.
Suppressed when no tag group is populated; a populated dimension may be promoted to its own chart via override.
